title: Negheriting Shiva Doul
tagline: Negheriting Shiva Doul — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: The Negheriting Shiva Doul is a Shiva temple at Dergaon in Assam, India.
overview.description: The Negheriting Shiva Doul is a Shiva temple at Dergaon in Assam, India. Situated on a hillock at about one and half km north from the National Highway 37 in the Golaghat district of Assam. This is a national protected monument. Later due to natural calamities it came into destruction.

topPlaces.name: Dergaon
topPlaces.description: Dergaon (IPA: ˈdɜːˌgɑ̃ʊ) is a town and a municipality in the Golaghat district of Assam, India. It is 282 km from Guwahati.

topPlaces.name: Kaiborta Gaon
topPlaces.description: Kaiborta Gaon is a census village in Golaghat district, Assam, India. As per the 2011 Census of India, Kaiborta Gaon has a total population of 6,327 people, including 3,227 males and 3,100 females with a literacy rate of 55.56%.

items.note: Dergaon (IPA: ˈdɜːˌgɑ̃ʊ) is a town and a municipality in the Golaghat district of Assam, India. It is 282 km from Guwahati.

Kaiborta Gaon is a census village in Golaghat district, Assam, India. As per the 2011 Census of India, Kaiborta Gaon has a total population of 6,327 people, including 3,227 males and 3,100 females with a literacy rate of 55.56%.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Negheriting Shiva Doul?
faq.a: The best time to visit Negheriting Shiva Doul is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Negheriting Shiva Doul?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jorhat Airport (22 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (92 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Negheriting Shiva Doul?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Negheriting Shiva Doul at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Negheriting Shiva Doul?
faq.a: Stays in Negheriting Shiva Doul start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Negheriting Shiva Doul?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dergaon, Kaiborta Gaon.
